channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: AI in Real Estate Listings and Condo Discounts: Key Trends in Canadian Housing Market
item.description: The article explores critical developments in Canada's real estate market, focusing on three main themes: the rise of artificial intelligence in property listings, the use of non-disclosure agreements...

item.title: US Life Expectancy Hits Record High Amid Declining Death Rates
item.description: The United States' age-adjusted death rate reached a record low in 2025, contributing to a potential record high in life expectancy. According to the CDC, the death rate dropped to 689 per 100,000 peo...

item.title: Kenyan Man Forgives Ex After Heartbreaking Breakup
item.description: A video of a Kenyan man emotionally breaking down after a painful breakup has gone viral on social media, sparking mixed reactions. The clip shows the young man, visibly heartbroken, expressing his pa...

item.title: Debate over USAID funding cuts intensifies after Lancet report on global mortality, with criticism directed at Elon Musk
item.description: The article discusses growing international controversy following a report associated with The Lancet that links reductions in USAID funding to a large number of global deaths, estimated at around 14 ...

item.title: Khampepe commission continues inquiry into alleged delays in TRC-related prosecutions
item.description: The Khampepe commission of inquiry is continuing its hearings into allegations that efforts were made to stall investigations and prosecutions linked to apartheid-era crimes dealt with under the Truth...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei's Funeral and International Response
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, Iran's supreme leader, was assassinated in a US-Israeli strike on February 28. His funeral, delayed during the Middle East conflict, is now taking place as Iran and the US upho...

item.title: Africa's Economic Challenges and Investment Risks in a Shifting Global Landscape
item.description: The article discusses the ongoing debate about the bias in credit ratings assigned by the Big Three agencies (Moody's, S&P, Fitch) toward African countries and the proposed African Credit Rating Agenc...

item.title: UP Open University releases July–December 2026 schedule for 25 free self-paced online courses
item.description: The University of the Philippines Open University (UPOU) has announced its Massive Open Online Course (MOOC) offerings for the period of July to December 2026, providing learners access to 25 free, se...

item.title: Andy Burnham’s plan for a major expansion of council housing faces significant practical and financial challenges
item.description: Andy Burnham has set out an ambitious vision for a large-scale expansion of council housebuilding, arguing that a return to strong local authority-led development is essential to address England’s gro...

item.title: Fernida fan jacket review: wearable cooling tech tested during a UK heatwave
item.description: The article reviews a wearable cooling device known as a fan jacket, inspired by Japanese designs originally developed in the early 2000s by a former Sony engineer to help outdoor workers cope with ex...

item.title: Senate, PNP conduct security inspection ahead of Vice President Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Philippine Senate and the Philippine National Police (PNP) carried out a security inspection at the Senate complex on Friday in preparation for the upcoming impeachment trial of Vice President Sar...

item.title: Jackie Matubia shocked after long-serving house help leaves home without notice
item.description: Veteran Kenyan actress Jackie Matubia has shared an emotional account of an unexpected incident involving her long-term house help, who had worked for her for nearly five to six years. According to Ma...

item.title: Turkey progresses early evaluation of Canadian Candu reactor technology as AtkinsRéalis eyes nuclear project opportunity
item.description: Turkey is expected to complete an early-stage assessment of Canadian Candu nuclear reactor technology by the end of the summer, according to AtkinsRéalis, potentially paving the way for formal negotia...

item.title: Switzerland, Portugal and Spain advance to FIFA World Cup 2026™ round of 16 after decisive knockout wins
item.description: Switzerland have progressed to the FIFA World Cup 2026™ round of 16 after a controlled 2–0 victory over Algeria, continuing their strong tournament form. The Swiss side took the lead through Breel Emb...

item.title: Delhi government to pilot youth-led civic tech solutions from Delhi Next hackathon
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta has announced that several innovative ideas emerging from the 'Delhi Next – Code, Create & Change' hackathon will be taken forward for pilot implementation by the gove...

item.title: Analysis of MAGA Reaction to Supreme Court Birthright Citizenship Ruling
item.description: The article analyzes the political and ideological reaction from MAGA-aligned figures following a Supreme Court decision that reaffirmed the long-standing interpretation of the 14th Amendment’s birthr...

item.title: Star Magic artists talk about their aspirations and future goals
item.description: Star Magic talents Francine Diaz, Lella Ford, Rave Victoria, along with other emerging artists under ABS-CBN’s Star Magic, took part in a recent feature where they opened up about their personal dream...

item.title: South Africa records highest June vehicle sales in 19 years amid strong fleet demand
item.description: South Africa’s new vehicle market delivered its strongest June performance in nearly two decades, with domestic sales reaching 54,482 units, according to industry body Naamsa. This marks the highest J...

item.title: Kenneth Okonkwo Explains ADC’s Choice of Vice Presidential Candidate and South-East Exclusion
item.description: Kenneth Okonkwo, a prominent chieftain of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), has explained the reasoning behind the party’s decision regarding the choice of vice presidential candidate for the 202...

item.title: Kenya Police Clear Barricades After Morning Gridlock
item.description: Police in Kenya have cleared barricades erected by suspected thugs near Pangani, restoring traffic flow on the Thika Superhighway after a morning disruption. The incident, which occurred on Friday, sa...
